default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session to align on content strategy and operational processes for NoBoringDesign's SEO initiative with fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Initial content strategy focuses on broad topics covering NoBoringDesign's services, with plans to refine based on performance data](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Visual content integration is a key challenge; exploring creative solutions like linking to portfolio and reusing existing assets](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [Calibration articles will be delivered first to align on tone, style, and process before scaling to full production](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Pain points from client interactions will be leveraged to inform future content ideas and angles](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Prioritization

  - [Initial strategy covers broad topics related to NoBoringDesign's services (branding, web design, motion design, marketing design, illustration)](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Team agreed to evenly spread content across main hypotheses to start, refining based on performance data after 3-6 months](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Potential to explore content angles around client journeys and pain points (e.g., "just closed funding, need a brand")](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)

### Visual Content Integration

  - [Challenge: NoBoringDesign lacks resources for custom graphics for each blog post](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [Proposed solutions:](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
      - [Link to relevant portfolio pieces within articles](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
      - [Utilize existing sales deck assets and illustrations](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
      - [Create a shared Google Drive with tagged design assets for easy access](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
      - [Explore programmatic ways to surface relevant visuals efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)

### Content Production Process

  - [fwd.digital team to deliver calibration articles first for review and approval](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Plan to scale up gradually: calibration articles → 5 weekly articles → 10 weekly articles](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=2657.0)
  - [Emphasis on iterative improvement: publish at 70% quality, then refine based on performance](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Blog section in Webflow is in development; fwd.digital to provide best practices for blog structure](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=2033.0)
  - [Webflow confirmed capable of handling substantial blog content without performance issues](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=2440.0)

### Future Optimizations

  - [Interlinking strategy to boost SEO performance and user experience](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=2230.0)
  - [Content refreshes and SEO testing to improve existing content over time](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=2154.0)
  - [Potential for email newsletter or lead magnet to nurture prospects not ready to book a call](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=2592.0)

## Next Steps

1.  NoBoringDesign to provide:
      - [Access to Notion page with tagged design assets](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
      - [One-page tone of voice document by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=2033.0)
      - [List of keywords/topics to avoid or reframe (e.g., WordPress)](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=2777.0)
2.  fwd.digital to:
      - [Deliver first set of calibration articles for review](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=2621.0)
      - [Provide best practices for blog structure in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=2044.0)
      - [Begin extracting pain points from provided sales call recordings](https://fathom.video/share/RcmzyaEAqJ_hakfR2GP6jG1Hj1BeMSzp?tab=summary&timestamp=2849.0)
3.  Schedule follow-up to discuss blog structure and CMS implementation
4.  Review and approve content strategy in Airtable
5.  Explore potential for leveraging recorded sales calls for content ideas

action_items.description: Share link to Notion page w/ tagged work examples
Create 1-page tone of voice doc by end of week
Deliver first calibration articles for review/approval
Share retainer project examples once closed in next 1-2 weeks
Finalize blog structure w/ Juan (creative dir); share info by end of week
Send best practice recs for blog article page & navigation structure
